# Gillnet 

Should a cetacean become entangled with the gillnet, the relevant data shall be reported. In the E-SET-CATCHES section, the species of cetacean, and the number of individuals should be reported. In the E-SET-CATCHES-SPECIMEN-SSI section, more details will be added pertaining to the condition of the individual and the gear interaction. In trip reports, there should be a description of the incident. This will include how and why the interaction occurred, the location of the entanglement, the steps taken to endure a safe release, and an assessment of the individual upon release.
